title: Darshan Hiranandani : Is there a way to stop the date selector from being displaced while using it?

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

I’m Darshan Hiranandani, currently managing several project boards and need to address a couple of date-related issues:

  1. Start Date Adjustment: Our project board template was set up in March, and we need to adjust the start date so that it reflects the date when each project board is actually created, rather than the date on the template.
  2. Date Selector Issue: The calendar date selector is problematic. While you can navigate months using the right and left arrows, the entire calendar box keeps jumping around the screen, which makes it difficult to select dates accurately.

Does anyone have suggestions or solutions for:

  • Setting the start date to automatically reflect the creation date of the project board?
  • Fixing the issue with the date selector moving around to ensure a smoother date selection process?

Any insights or tips on resolving these issues would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks for your help!

Best,
Darshan Hiranandani
